title: Argentinian Beef Stir Fry
description: A classic Argentinian beef dish with a creamy twist, served with a side of stir-fried vegetables.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced bell peppers and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the ground beef to the skillet, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Cook the beef until it is browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Stir in the softened cream cheese until melted and well combined.
Add the soy sauce and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
